overview.name: WebSocket STOMP Variations
overview.description:
This scenario verifies STOMP WebSocket execution using variations file.
Test flow includes: 1. Load test data from variations CSV file. 2. Connect to STOMP WebSocket for each variation row. 3. Subscribe to /topic/ping. 4. Send message to /app/ping using variation value. 5. Receive and verify response using expected file from variation.
This scenario validates: - Variation value injection into websocket message - Variation value injection into expected file names - Repeated STOMP execution using multiple variation rows - Stable websocket send/receive flow for different input values

websocket.comment: Step 1-5. Execute STOMP ping flow using variation-based message

send.comment: Send ping message using variation value

receive.comment: Receive and verify ping response using variation-based expected file
